{{Quote|There were four organizations which gathered and analyzed intelligence for the Senate and other agencies of the Old Republic - the Republican Security Organization, the Senate Bureau of Intelligence, the Interstellar Consortium on Technology, and the euphemistically labeled Special Acquisitions Branch of the Library of the Republic.|A report from the Imperial Security Bureau to the ISB Central Office, prepared shortly after the Battle of Yavin|<ref name="ISB" />}}
The '''Special Acquisitions Branch''' of the [[Library of the Republic]] was a premiere data-location service of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during its later [[Standard year/Legends|years]], and one of the Republic's four major intelligence agencies. In the years leading up to and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the agency fell victim to corruption and [[Galactic Senate/Legends|senatorial]] misuse. To counteract this, the organization's director met in secret with the directors of the three other major intelligence agencies, all of whom voted to quietly merge their agencies into a single organization. After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], this combined agency emerged as [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] under the direction of former [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|SBI]] [[Director of the Senate Bureau of Intelligence|director]] [[Armand Isard/Legends|Armand Isard]].
